title: athroandra angolensis
intro: Athroandra angolensis is a plant species belonging to the family Hernandiaceae, commonly found in tropical Africa. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including wound healing, reduction of fever, and treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Athroandra angolensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to address various health conditions.
